portfolio_id.description: ID of the portfolio to which the goal belongs.

target_year.title: Target Year
target_year.description: Year by which the goal is to be achieved.

target_corpus.title: Target Corpus
target_corpus.description: Target corpus value for the goal.

goal_current_corpus.title: Current Corpus
goal_current_corpus.description: Current corpus value for the goal.

goal_progress_percentage.title: Progress Percentage
goal_progress_percentage.description: Percentage of progress towards the goal.

goal_expected_equity_allocation.title: Expected Equity Allocation
goal_expected_equity_allocation.description: Expected equity allocation percentage for the goal.

goal_expected_debt_allocation.title: Expected Debt Allocation
goal_expected_debt_allocation.description: Expected debt allocation percentage for the goal.

goal_expected_gold_allocation.title: Expected Gold Allocation
goal_expected_gold_allocation.description: Expected gold allocation percentage for the goal.

goal_current_equity_allocation.title: Current Equity Allocation
goal_current_equity_allocation.description: Current equity allocation percentage for the goal.

goal_current_debt_allocation.title: Current Debt Allocation
goal_current_debt_allocation.description: Current debt allocation percentage for the goal.

goal_current_gold_allocation.title: Current Gold Allocation
goal_current_gold_allocation.description: Current gold allocation percentage for the goal.

goal_tax_liability.title: Estimated Tax Liability on Goal on End Date
goal_tax_liability.description: Estimated tax liability for the financial goal at the target year based on the expected corpus and the applicable tax rates. This should be system calculated based on the formula - Tax = (STCG * stcg_percentage) + (LTCG * ltcg_percentage) + (Cess * cess_percentage)

investments.description: List of investments associated with the goal.
investments.title: Investments
